resources.description: Whats in all these blends? Hopefully this helps!

resources.title: The Life of a Vine
resources.description: We always talk about vines but do we really understand them? I hope this helps!

resources.title: From Vine to Bottle
resources.description: What is the harvest to harvest cycle so much happens in between, hopefully this waks you through the process!

resources.description: Everyday Wine Glorssary terms at  your fingertips!

resources.description: So many terms to describe wine. Here are some of the most common ones!

resources.title: Wine Making Terms
resources.description: What are these wine makers talking about? Skin contact and maceration. This will help with some of the terms!

resources.title: Wine Regions and Their Soil
resources.description: One of the most facinating aspects of wine. Its amazing how the same grape can turn out different depending on the soil compostion in the region its grown in. Here is a break down of famous regions and what makes them so unique!

resources.title: Wine and Food Pairing
resources.description: Check out the interactive guide on our website but if you just wanted a printed cheat sheet; here you go!

resources.title: Serving Wine Tips
resources.description: General tips on temparature, order of serving wine and much more!

resources.title: How to Taste Wine
resources.description: Step by step guide to tasting wine, if you want to know how the professionals do it.

resources.title: Wine Making Philosophy
resources.description: What is Natural, Organic, Biodynamic or just the conventional method? Here is a glimpse. Just know just because its conventional doesnt mean they are not practicing organic methods; particulalry now a days.

resources.title: Vintage  Guide
resources.description: This is always a tough one. Whats a great vintage? Someone winemakers can make a great wine in a poor vintage and some a poor wine in a great vintage. Use this as a general guide.

resources.title: How to Read an Italian Wine Label
resources.description: Let's decode wine labels. Here is Italy!

resources.title: How to Read a Spanish Wine Label
resources.description: Lets decode wine labels. Here is Spain!

resources.title: How to Read French Wine Labels
resources.description: France takes the cake on wine labels, almost every region does it different. Hope this helps!

resources.title: Palate & Structure Guide
resources.description: We have the interactive link but if you just want to print the cheat sheet. Here you go!

resources.title: Pronunciation Guide
resources.description: Is the "r" in Viogner pronounced or silent? In addition to the interactive pronunciation tool, this guide will lead you down the right path. Btw...the "r" is neither silent nor pronounced! Shout out to my friend Joel for this suggestion!

resources.title: What Varietal is in the Bottle?
resources.description: Knowing what varietal (grape) is in bottles from other countries and regions is hard! What is a Sancerre? The bottle sadly doesnt tell you so hopefully this ittle cheat sheet will help. Btw...its Sauvignon Blanc!

resources.title: Brief: Guide to Specific Grapes
resources.description: Brief: All about the major grapes. Your one stop shop!

resources.title: Region to Grape
resources.description: Whats in a Chablis? Breaks down what varietals correlate to specific regions.

resources.title: In Depth: Guide to Grapes
resources.description: Go deeper in to each varietal. Lets geek out on wine!

resources.title: In Depth: Guide to Regions
resources.description: Lets go deeper in to some of the major regions of the world. Soile, climate, location and so much more!
